headline: AssistCo assistant exposes private billing notes
source_summary: A support assistant exposed private billing notes in customer-facing replies.

headline: RoboFleet robot pilot rollback follows navigation failures
source_summary: Operators paused a sidewalk robot pilot after repeated navigation failures and escalations.

headline: SignalLoop timeline slips after repeated launch delay
source_summary: The company acknowledged another late release after missing its prior rollout target.

headline: NovaDesk billing dashboard outage strands customers
source_summary: A reporting dashboard remained unavailable while the company resolved an external billing dispute.
